title: Bingo Reloaded Companion
description: Companion mod usable on servers that use Bingo Reloaded
body:
This mod is a companion mod for [Bingo Reloaded](https://modrinth.com/plugin/bingo-reloaded).

This mod only works on servers that use Bingo Reloaded version 3.3.0 or higher.

When the game it will display your bingo card on the screen at all times, even when in your inventory. The regular card can still be used as well to read the details of a task.

The positioning and visibility of on-screen elements can be changed using Mod Menu or by editing the config file manually.
